channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.3.1
item.description:
### Added
- **Setup code pairing** — paste the setup code from `openclaw qr --json` for instant device authorization. No browser, no manual approval needed.
  - New "Have a setup code?" link in the connection wizard
  - Setup code field in the pairing sheet (primary path)
  - Decodes base64 JSON payload (url + bootstrapToken)
  - BootstrapToken sent during handshake for automatic pairing

### Fixed
- **Correct pairing detection** — checks the connect response error code (`NOT_PAIRED`) instead of unreliable WebSocket close code sniffing
- **Connection wizard handles pairing** — all probe paths (auto-detect, manual, advanced) detect pairing errors and show the pairing sheet
- **Profile auto-saved on pairing** — gateway profile created automatically during first-time pairing

### Improved
- **Redesigned pairing sheet** — setup code as primary path, manual Control UI approval as fallback with auto-polling
- **Version display** — MARKETING_VERSION correctly set to 1.3.1

---
**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/1devstudio/clawdeck/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1
